<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Build Roadmap (M0-M10, dependencies)" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-774" dy="-278" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="730" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="M0" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="M0 Monorepo scaffold
pnpm+turbo, shared, Supabase hosted, CI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="165" x="40" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="M1 DB · Auth · shared client

quick-add, validated, progress ring" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="165" x="390" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="M3 History + stats
7/30-day, streak (shared calc)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="165" x="565" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="M4 Reminder settings + computor
